name: forge_new_connector
description: Forge (generate + register) a brand new connector for Grok/Super Grok using ONLY the desired effect: connector name + short description + resource_type (web_api/filesystem/etc) + auth + actions. Invokes the real production ConnectorForge engine at workdir/Projects/Connector_Forge/connector_forge.py (interactive_forge or direct class API). Produces generated code (filled from templates), metadata.json, updates connector_index.json, places in generated_connectors/. No hand-writing of Connector.ts/py, no manual index. Optional follow-up publish via publish_connector_to_github or add as podman MCP.

description.description: Short description of what the connector does and exposes.

resource_type.description: web_api | filesystem | database | app | other . Defaults to web_api.

auth_method.description: api_key | oauth2 | basic_auth | service_account | none | other

base_url.description: Base API URL or root if applicable.

supported_actions.description: Comma sep or list: read,write,search,create,execute etc.

non_interactive.description: If true, bypass input() and use provided params only. For full TASK automation.

steps.description: cd to workdir/Projects/Connector_Forge ; run python connector_forge.py or directly: from connector_forge import ConnectorForge; forge=ConnectorForge(); out = forge.interactive_forge() but with params injected (monkey or CLI args extension). Or extend to accept --name --desc etc for non-interactive. Real execution of the forge engine produces files + index update.
Review generated: list files in output_dir. Optionally run tests if present. Update any SKILLS_CATALOG or bundled.
If podmanized, call add_podman_mcp TASK. Else call publish_connector_to_github TASK on the generated dir. Chainable.
Call track_task_in_linear with title 'Forged connector: <name>' and details.

example_invocation: {forge_new_connector; name=TaskmasterGithubBridge; description=Bridge between taskmaster TASKs and github file ops for auto publish; resource_type=web_api; auth_method=none; supported_actions=["publish_task_defs","search_tasks"]; non_interactive=true}
ties_to: Connector_Forge/connector_forge.py , templates in same dir, connector_index.json
